summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing for ASR Enterprises iteration 20. All backend APIs (13/13) passed. Frontend verification complete for all major new features including: Book Service with Razorpay integration, premium Flipkart-style Shop UI, Bihar district-based delivery fees, product-specific pincode delivery check, agent registration page, and admin shop management.
seed_data_creation: Test orders and agent registrations created during testing - cleaned up where applicable
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 20 features working correctly. Key features verified: 1) GET /api/shop/book-service-config returns price=1500 and razorpay key_id. 2) PUT /api/shop/book-service-config updates price successfully. 3) GET /api/shop/bihar-districts returns 37 districts with delivery fees (Patna=50, Gaya=150, etc.). 4) Product-specific delivery check works via /api/shop/products/{id}/check-delivery/{pincode}. 5) Agent registration at /api/agents/register creates new agent with AGT prefix. 6) Frontend /become-agent page has complete registration form with KYC and bank details. 7) Homepage 'Book Service' button opens Razorpay modal (does NOT redirect). 8) Shop page has premium Flipkart-style UI with white background, sticky header, search bar, category strip, trust badges. 9) Product cards have wishlist heart icons and share buttons. 10) Product detail modal has pincode delivery check, share options (WhatsApp, Facebook, Email, Copy Link), Add to Cart. 11) Checkout shows Bihar district-based delivery fees (Patna ₹50, others vary). 12) No 'Govt Schemes' in navigation. 13) Shop link opens in new tab (target='_blank'). 14) Admin /admin/shop has Book Service Price config with Update Price button.

backend_apis.POST /api/generate-service-description: PASSED - Returns generated=true with AI description
backend_apis.POST /api/agents/register: PASSED - Creates agent with AGT prefix
